member.name: T:Empiria.FinancialAccounting.ClientServices.AccountsServices
member.summary: Provides financial accounting accounts services using a web proxy.

member.summary: Provides financial accounting cash ledger transactions services using a web proxy.

member.name: T:Empiria.FinancialAccounting.ClientServices.BaseService
member.summary: Base abstract type used to inherit all services.
